topic: B12 deficiency: often misdiagnosed as depression
caption: Did you know that B12 deficiency can be misdiagnosed as depression? 🤯 It's time to get informed. Vitamin B12 plays a crucial role in our nervous system, and a deficiency can lead to symptoms like fatigue, weakness, and mood changes. 💔 In fact, studies show that up to 25% of patients with B12 deficiency are initially misdiagnosed with depression. 📊 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💚👏🔥
